retry_reason: Failure indicates the bus is no longer valid; retrying will not change the outcome.
contract_summary: Get wrapper that acquires a reference on the bus_type's underlying subsys_private structure. Returns a pointer to the bus_type if the bus is still valid (non-zero refcount), else NULL. The caller must check the return value and, if non-NULL, must later release the reference with a corresponding put (e.g., bus_put). This function does not allocate resources; it only takes a reference to an existing object. The caller must not use the bus pointer after the reference is released.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to acquire a reference to the bus_type via bus_to_subsys; the only logic is the NULL check and return. The critical variable bus is returned to the caller on success.

check.reason: bus_get calls bus_to_subsys which performs a get on the refcount accessible via bus->p.subsys.kobj.kref.refcount. The function returns 'bus' only when the get succeeds, so the critical variable is the return value 'bus'. The access path and type chain are consistent: bus_type has p (subsys_private*), which has subsys (kset), which has kobj (kobject), which has kref (kref), which has refcount (refcount_t). Segment counts match (6 each).
